remarks.name: Dataiku Blog
remarks.role: AI governance, enterprise AI platform deployment, MLOps, analytics, agent orchestration.
remarks.text: Governance as acceleration: data proves it’s not a speed bump
remarks.content: For years, the enterprise AI governance conversation has been shaped by a quiet assumption: Governance is the thing that slows AI down. This may look like the review cycle that delays the launch, committee that questions the model, or even documentation requirement that sits between a wo
remarks.contentTranslation: 多年来，企业AI治理对话一直被一个安静的假设所塑造：治理是减缓AI的因素。这可能看起来像延迟发布的审核周期、质疑模型的委员会，甚至是WO之间的文档要求
remarks.translation: 治理作为加速：数据证明它不是减速带
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察 builder 对产品、创业、销售或市场节奏的判断；可作为选题线索，不直接等同于行业结论。

remarks.name: Dataiku Blog
remarks.role: AI governance, enterprise AI platform deployment, MLOps, analytics, agent orchestration.
remarks.text: Generative AI governance framework: building responsible AI systems
remarks.content: Generative AI is no longer a pilot that leaders can observe from a distance. It is in contact centers, developer workflows, reporting layers, and autonomous agents acting on behalf of the business. As BARC's research on modernizing governance for the era of agentic AI shows, the stakes r
remarks.contentTranslation: 生成式AI不再是领导者可以远距离观察的试点。它存在于联系中心、开发人员工作流、报告层和代表业务行事的自主Agent中。正如BARC关于智能AI时代治理现代化的研究所表明的那样，
remarks.translation: 生成式AI治理框架：构建负责任的AI系统

remarks.name: Dataiku Blog
remarks.role: AI governance, enterprise AI platform deployment, MLOps, analytics, agent orchestration.
remarks.text: Sovereignty isn't where your AI runs. It's whether it answers to you.
remarks.content: Last week, a government order took the world's best AI model offline in hours. No one deleted it and no server failed. A single directive put the most capable model on the market out of reach for everyone not a citizen of one country.
remarks.contentTranslation: 上周，一项政府命令在数小时内让世界上最好的AI模型下线。没有人将其删除，也没有服务器发生故障。单一指令使市场上最有能力的模型对每个人不是一个国家的公民来说都是遥不可及的。
remarks.translation: 主权并不是你的AI运行的地方。问题在于它是否对你有所回应。
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察 builder 对产品、创业、销售或市场节奏的判断；可作为选题线索，不直接等同于行业结论。

remarks.text: Agentic AI tools in 2026: what to look for when choosing an enterprise-grade solution
remarks.content: Most vendors claim their agentic AI platform is enterprise-grade. In a market where the term has lost almost all meaning, the real test is not the demo. It is what happens after, when agents meet real data, real governance requirements, and the organizational complexity that no sandbox c
remarks.contentTranslation: 大多数供应商声称他们的AgentAI平台是企业级的。在这个术语几乎失去所有意义的市场中，真正的考验不是演示。当座席满足真实数据、真实治理要求以及没有沙箱的组织复杂性时，
remarks.translation: 2026年的Agentic AI工具：在选择企业级解决方案时要注意什么

remarks.role: Polyagentmorous ClawFather. Came back from retirement to mess with AI and help a lobster take over the world.
remarks.text:
People here discussing what happened with OpenClaw.

The hype died down. We improved quality and grew a team. We created a non-profit whereas competiors are VC funded and have other agendas.

This is our strongest week so far. https://t.co/j6uwRneNvh
remarks.translation: 这里的人在讨论OpenClaw发生的事情。炒作逐渐平息。我们提高了质量，并发展了一支团队。我们创建了一个非营利组织，而竞争对手则获得风险投资资助并有其他议程。这是我们迄今为止最强劲的一周。

remarks.role: achieve ambition with intentionality, intensity, integrity & insanity.
remarks.text:
btw i've been shopping around for insurers for the New Media Lab we are setting up (basically the creative playground housing swyx inc) and yeah the NPS of Corgi is insanely high

my real estate broker: "just go with corgi they are covering every single one of my clients rn"

breaking through with ~100% greenfield market share like this is unheard of in the insurance industry
remarks.translation: 顺便说一句，我一直在为我们正在建立的新媒体实验室（基本上是创意游乐场住房swyx inc ）寻找保险公司，是的，柯基的NPS非常高，我的房地产经纪人： “只要与柯基一起去，他们就覆盖了我的每一个客户rn”突破了~ 100%的绿地市场份额，这在保险业是闻所未闻的

remarks.name: Zara Zhang
remarks.role: Builder. Dangerously skips permissions. Harvard’17. GitHub: https://t.co/KCuEajezlL YouTube: https://t.co/8xzbGWtf6w
remarks.text:
A good rule of thumb for preventing AI slop (in writing, design, etc):

Is your input (the context) longer than the output? 

I've found that for the AI to produce quality results, my input is often 3-5 times the length of the output.

If your input is much shorter than the output, it's almost certainly going to produce slop
remarks.translation: 防止AI（写作、设计等）的良好经验法则：您的输入（上下文）是否长于输出？我发现，为了让AI产生高质量的结果，我的输入通常是输出长度的3-5倍。如果你的输入比输出短得多，它几乎肯定会产生斜率
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察 builder 对产品、创业、销售或市场节奏的判断；可作为选题线索，不直接等同于行业结论。

remarks.name: Aaron Levie
remarks.role: ceo box - your business lives in content. unleash it with AI
remarks.text:
Another new idea to push the state of AI architectures forward. Sakana released a model that effectively uses a mixture of models to get work done. You get a single API but then the work gets farmed out the model that best performs the task. 

“Fugu manages model selection, delegation, verification, and synthesis automatically. It solves tasks directly when that is enough, or coordinates a team of expert models when a problem calls for more. The complexity of a multi-agent system never reaches your code.”

This is generally how applied AI products are building their agent harnesses at this point, but the idea of making this an LLM that any developer can interact with is also a great idea. As we get more innovation with both frontier closed and OSS models, there’s going to be a ton of value produced for the layer that can route the best.
remarks.translation:
推动AI架构发展的另一个新想法。Sakana发布了一个模型，该模型有效地使用混合模型来完成工作。您获得单个API ，但随后工作得到了最能执行任务的模型。“Fugu自动管理模型选择、委派、验证和合成。它可以在足够的时候直接解决任务，或者在问题需要更多时协调专家模型团队。
多Agent系统的复杂性永远不会到达您的代码。“这通常是应用AI产品目前构建其Agent线束的方式，但将其作为任何开发人员都可以与之交互的LLM的想法也是一个好主意。随着我们通过前沿封闭和开放源码软件模型获得更多创新，将为能够提供最佳路线的层产生大量价值。
remarks.observation: 这条言论可作为 Agent 产品形态、协作方式或能力边界的观察入口；只代表公开观点，不作为公司事实主证据。

remarks.name: Peter Yang
remarks.role: Practical AI tutorials and interviews for busy people
remarks.text:
It’s funny, growing up as an immigrant I developed a scarcity mindset around saving money and resources.

But when it comes to unlimited token plans and tokenmaxxing, it feels like a missed opportunity if I don’t burn as many tokens as possible and hit the limit each time.

How do I address this disconnect? 🥹
remarks.translation: 有趣的是，作为移民长大，我养成了节省金钱和资源的稀缺心态。但是，当涉及到无限代币计划和tokenmaxxing时，如果我不尽可能多地燃烧代币并每次达到极限，感觉就像错过了机会。如何解决这种脱节问题？ 🥹
remarks.observation: 这条言论适合观察 builder 对产品、创业、销售或市场节奏的判断；可作为选题线索，不直接等同于行业结论。

remarks.role: ceo box - your business lives in content. unleash it with AI
remarks.text:
Agents will use software 100X more than people. 

When that happens, theres a huge need for guardrails on what the agents are doing so they don’t leak data or change the wrong information, authoritative sources of truth for them to work with, logging and auditing of what they’re doing, the ability to collaborate with people through these systems, and more.

A simple query on any given agentic task could pull in more data than a user touches in a month. As a result, there are lots of categories of software that when it goes headless that the usage and value go up substantially. Agents will end up using our CRM data, documents and corporate knowledge, analytics data, and other information far more than people ever did.

The platforms that can move toward the model of powering these headless interactions, and have a business model and technology strategy to support this, will be in the best position in the future.
remarks.translation:
客服代表使用软件的人数是普通人的100倍。当这种情况发生时，Agent非常需要保护措施，这样他们就不会泄露数据或更改错误的信息，他们可以使用的权威真相来源，记录和审计他们正在做的事情，通过这些系统与人们合作的能力等等。对任何给定Agent任务的简单查询可以提取比用户在一个月内接触到的数据更多的数据。
因此，有很多类别的软件，当它无头时，使用率和价值就会大幅上升。客服代表最终将比以往任何时候都更多地使用我们的CRM数据、文档和公司知识、分析数据和其他信息。能够朝着为这些无头交互提供动力的模式发展的平台，以及为此提供支持的商业模式和技术战略，将在未来处于最佳位置。
remarks.observation: 这条言论可作为 Agent 产品形态、协作方式或能力边界的观察入口；只代表公开观点，不作为公司事实主证据。

remarks.text: “Quality is irrational” is a great way to describe it. You have to have an irrational level of commitment to constantly choose quality and an irrational level of self-belief that controlling things top to bottom will yield better results than using common frameworks. https://t.co/NPtm8c7sid
remarks.translation: “质量是不合理的”是一个很好的描述方式。您必须有一个不合理的承诺水平，不断选择质量，并有一个不合理的自信水平，即自上而下地控制事物会比使用共同的框架产生更好的结果。

remarks.name: Peter Yang
remarks.role: Practical AI tutorials and interviews for busy people
remarks.text:
Why HTML turned out to be the foundation for agentic video making from @liu8in:

“We’ve been trying to build a video agent. However, we learned the hard way that agents have no visual intelligence.

So that’s when we turned to code. HTML is the LLM’s native language. LLMs can express not only information, but also visual aesthetics through HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

Footage, images, assets, SVGs can all sit on top of HTML."

📌 As an example, see how you can make a product video from any website URL here: https://t.co/Q2p8XzCfc6
remarks.translation:
为什么HTML被证明是@ liu8inAgent视频制作的基础： “我们一直在尝试构建一个视频Agent。然而，我们很难理解客服代表没有视觉智能。这就是我们转向代码的时候。HTML是法学硕士的母语。LLM不仅可以通过HTML、CSS和JavaScript表达信息，还可以表达视觉美学。
素材、图像、资源、SVG都可以放在HTML之上。"📌例如，您可以在此处查看如何从任何网站网址制作产品视频：
remarks.observation: 这条言论可作为 Agent 产品形态、协作方式或能力边界的观察入口；只代表公开观点，不作为公司事实主证据。

remarks.text:
Happens every week 🙈

> see an interesting project on X
> play with it, fork it, try it, have some ideas
> go to founder profile
> press the message button 

…

> pray to God that I haven’t missed a DM from them before 😢

I try to respond to all the DMs but miss sometimes!!
remarks.translation: 每周都会发生🙈>在X上看到一个有趣的项目>玩它，分叉它，尝试它，有一些想法>转到创始人资料>按消息按钮…… >向上帝祈祷，在我尝试回复所有的DM之前，😢我没有错过他们的DM ，但有时会错过！ ！

remarks.role: President & CEO ycombinator —Founder garryslist—Creator of GStack & GBrain—designer/engineer who helps founders—SF Dem accelerating the boom loop
remarks.text:
I think one underestimated thing when we look back on it was how useful it is to have your own personal brain and company brain in 2026 at the dawn of usable AGI

AGI gives you the intelligence

You still have to collect your personal context to get the real unlock
remarks.translation: 我认为，当我们回顾它时，一件被低估的事情是，在2026年，在可用的AGI黎明时，拥有自己的个人大脑和公司大脑是多么有用。AGI给你的情报仍然需要收集你的个人背景才能获得真正的解锁

remarks.contentTranslation: 中国AI实验室Z.ai于6月13日向其编码计划用户发布了GLM-5.2 ，然后于昨天（ 6月16日）在麻省理工学院许可证下发布了完整的开放权重。与他们之前的GLM尺寸相似
